source: Illustrative USD exchange-rate snapshot (approximate mid-market rates). Each value is the USD worth of one unit of the currency, so value_usd = value * rates[currency]. MOCKED local snapshot — not live, not for settlement or accounting.
refresh: FX moves continuously; a production build would fetch daily/intraday from a rates provider (e.g. an FX API or central-bank feed) with a cached fallback. Re-snapshot is only a stopgap. Not financial advice.
